title: Add 'Welcome Cutee' gate button before website content

requirements.summary: Add a full-screen welcome gate with 'Welcome Cutee' button that must be clicked before the main LoveLetterPage content becomes visible, styled to match the existing dark romantic theme
acceptanceCriteria: On initial page load, only the gate screen is shown — the LoveLetterPage content is hidden.
The gate screen covers the full viewport.
A single button with the label 'Welcome Cutee' is centered on the gate screen.
Clicking the 'Welcome Cutee' button hides the gate and reveals the main LoveLetterPage content.
The gate's visual style (background, typography, button colors) is consistent with the existing dark romantic theme (dark background, gold/maroon accents, serif/cursive fonts).
The transition from gate to main content is smooth (e.g., fade or gentle animation).

file_operations.description: Create a new WelcomeGate component that renders a full-screen overlay with a dark romantic background (#1a1a1a or similar) and a centered 'Welcome Cutee' button. The button should use the gold/maroon color scheme from tailwind.config.js (maroon background, gold hover state) and cursive/serif fonts (Dancing Script or Playfair Display). Include a fade-in animation on mount and a fade-out animation when the button is clicked. The component should accept an onEnter callback prop that fires when the button is clicked.

Modify App.tsx to introduce a local state (useState) that tracks whether the welcome gate has been passed (e.g., showGate boolean, initially true). Conditionally render the WelcomeGate component when showGate is true. When the user clicks the 'Welcome Cutee' button (via the onEnter callback), set showGate to false and render the LoveLetterPage component. Ensure the transition is smooth by using CSS fade animations or a simple opacity transition.

Add CSS classes or keyframe animations to support the welcome gate fade-in and fade-out transitions (e.g., .gate-fade-in, .gate-fade-out). Ensure these animations are consistent with the existing fadeIn animation already defined in this file. Keep all existing styles for LoveLetterPage intact.
